search.subtitle: Enter a name to check its availability across multiple TLDs at once.
search.title: Direct Search

generate.leadCopy: Describe what you're building in <1>plain language</1>—we'll suggest <3>memorable name roots</3> to pair with the extensions below.
generate.promptInfo1: A short pitch works best: who it is for, the problem you solve, and the vibe you want. We send this text to the model as the main story behind your names.
generate.promptInfo2: Suggestions are base names only (no ".com" in the list). Pick your TLDs in the profile bar—they apply when you verify availability.
generate.promptPlaceholder: e.g. A calm budgeting app for couples who want shared goals without the spreadsheet…
generate.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser.
generate.focusWordsInfo1: Add up to five single words (no spaces) that should weigh more heavily than the rest of your description—think "trust," "speed," or a niche you want in the name.
generate.focusWordsInfo2: They are optional; the model still reads your full description when you do not add any.
generate.focusWordsCount: {{count}}/{{max}} focus words—each one nudges the AI more than the surrounding text.
generate.advancedIntro: Optional hints for how names might sound—the model treats them as inspiration, not a checklist.
generate.advancedInfo1: Prefixes and suffixes are comma-separated tokens (for example get, try or app, ly). We pass them to the model as ideas it may blend in when they still feel natural.
generate.advancedInfo2: You will not get every combination, and you can leave both fields empty.
generate.prefixesInfo: Words or fragments that could appear before the core name. Separate entries with commas.
generate.suffixesInfo: Words or fragments that could appear after the core name. Separate entries with commas.
generate.loadingText: Asking Gemini for fresh angles—usually just a few seconds.
generate.errorSingleToken: Each weighted word must be a single token (no spaces).
generate.errorMaxWords: You can add up to 5 weighted words.
generate.errorDuplicateWord: This weighted word is already added.
generate.verifyHint: This selection matches your last verification. Pick different domains if you want to run a fresh check.
phrases: Baking possibilities in the DNS oven...
Checking if someone beat us to it...

tlds.label: TLDs
tlds.info: Click any TLD to toggle it. Type a custom one (e.g. .xyz) in the input and press Enter to add it — custom TLDs are saved in your browser and persist across sessions.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Keep track of domains you care about, even if they are currently taken. Re-check anytime for status updates.
favorites.emptyHint: Star any result to save it here.
favorites.emptyText: Domains you star will appear here.

verification.title: Verification Results
verification.errorConnection: Could not verify domains. Check your connection and try again.
